name: ferni-figma-plugin
description: Ferni Design System for Figma - tokens, personas, animations, and linting

scripts.build:
esbuild src/code.ts --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/code.js --target=es2020 && esbuild src/ui.tsx --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/ui.js --target=es2020 --loader:.css=css && cp src/ui.html dist/ui.html 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ferni
' > dist/ui.html
